features: QUALITY & STYLE: OPULIZE KAT reading glasses offer incredible value whilst at the same time focusing on contemporary design. These modern lightweight cat-eye frames have been developed with comfort in mind
A PAIR FOR EVERYWHERE: Are you always losing your glasses or are they never in the right place at the right time? Now with OPULIZE's incredible value frames, you can have a pair in every room
COMFORT FIT: These easy to wear lightweight cat-eye frames twinned with spring hinges make OPULIZE KAT the perfect choice for readers. This modern shape provides a perfect fit for most faces
